title: Weekly Channel Performance Review
summary: A lightweight weekly system for checking channel health, spotting drop-offs early, and assigning immediate marketing follow-up work.
inputs: Notes on launches or experiments currently running
outputs: Priority fixes for the next seven days
Escalations for channels that need budget or creative changes
Weekly owner list for experiments and follow-ups

steps.title: Scan the channel dashboard
steps.description: Review each active channel for spend, volume, and conversion changes versus the prior week.

steps.title: Flag anomalies and bottlenecks
steps.description: Identify any sudden drops, spikes, pacing issues, broken links, or conversion bottlenecks that need action before the week ends.

steps.title: Choose corrective actions
steps.description: Assign one immediate action per problem channel, such as creative refresh, landing page fix, audience change, or spend cap adjustment.

steps.title: Capture learning
steps.description: Write down the main pattern from the week so the monthly review is built from evidence rather than memory.

kpis.target: No critical channel more than 10% off planned pacing without owner action

kpis.metric: Time to resolve major marketing issue

whenToImplement: As soon as more than one marketing channel is live and spend is material enough that missed issues have a real cost.
delegationNotes: Once a marketing lead or channel owner exists, they can prepare the review, but the founder should stay close to the patterns until channel economics are stable.
automationNotes: Automate channel dashboards, spend alerts, broken-form checks, and pacing notifications so the meeting focuses on decisions rather than data collection.
